description: Learn how to secure your Binance account with two-factor authentication (2FA) and whitelisting in this beginner's guide. The video covers essential steps to enhance your account security, including password creation and recognizing phishing attempts.
topic_summary: This video provides a step-by-step guide on securing your Binance account, focusing on 2FA setup and whitelisting wallet addresses. Key points include creating strong passwords and avoiding phishing scams [t=0:32-2:10].
